fleetScope.incidentVehicleAlias: INCIDENT_VEHICLE_001 maps to VEHICLE_006 (mapping not in git)

findings.title: openUnpluggedEpisode ignores snapshot-based telemetry recovery
findings.dataEvidence: 2/2 fleet unplug events remain logically open in DB; both have obdIsPluggedIn=true, CONNECTED, and polls within 22s after unplug
findings.impact: Fleet tab, vehicle detail, dashboard KPI, and data analyse can show Gerät getrennt while telemetry is live
findings.recommendation: Close open unplug episodes when connectivityAnchor shows plugged + telemetry resumed on same binding

findings.title: 100% of fleet unplug webhooks stuck open despite telemetry recovery — systemic not one-off
findings.codeEvidence: buildDeviceConnectionSummary event-only closure; no backfill job for episodes
findings.dataEvidence: VPS 60d audit: 2 UNPLUG, 0 PLUG, 2 SHOULD_HAVE_BEEN_RESOLVED_BY_TELEMETRY; VEHICLE_005 +51 trips after unplug; VEHICLE_006 +14 trips
findings.impact: Any future unplug without plug webhook will permanently degrade connectivity UX for LTE_R1 fleet
findings.reproduction: SELECT count(*) FROM dimo_device_connection_events WHERE event_type='OBD_DEVICE_UNPLUGGED' → compare with open episode logic
findings.recommendation: Treat as fleet-wide defect; implement closure rule + optional one-time read-model reconciliation

findings.title: Live telemetry and open unplug episode coexist on same vehicle
findings.codeEvidence: fleet-connectivity.util.ts deriveConnectionStatus independent of deviceConnection; frontend splits ObdRowChip vs DeviceConnectionWebhookChip
findings.dataEvidence: VEHICLE_005: lastSeen 2026-07-18T09:45:11Z, obd=true, openUnpluggedEpisode=true in 7d API window
findings.impact: Operators see online/live plus unplug warning simultaneously — erodes trust in Fleet Connectivity tab
findings.reproduction: Open Fleet Connectivity for VEHICLE_005 equivalent; compare ConnectionStatusChip vs DeviceConnectionWebhookChip
findings.recommendation: Unify via canonical ConnectivityViewModel or close episode on snapshot recovery

findings.title: 7-day device event query window hides unresolved episodes without closing them
findings.dataEvidence: VEHICLE_006 unplug 2026-07-08 outside 7d window on 2026-07-18; DB row persists but API returns no episode
findings.impact: Incident UI may disappear while DB episode remains unresolved; webhookConfigured flips to not_configured incorrectly
findings.reproduction: Compare full-history episode query vs getFleetSummariesForVehicles 7d filter for VEHICLE_006
findings.recommendation: Keep open episodes until explicitly resolved regardless of query window; separate recent-events pagination from episode state

findings.title: Fleet API offline at 24h vs canonical UI offline at 48h
findings.dataEvidence: Phase 2 state rule map; no fleet vehicles in 24-48h band at audit time but architectural mismatch confirmed
findings.impact: Same vehicle can be standby on Fleet tab and signal_delayed on Dashboard for 24-48h quiet period
findings.recommendation: Align Fleet connectivity freshness with canonical telemetryFreshness or document explicit product split

findings.title: Three CONNECTED vehicles lack ACTIVE consent ledger rows
findings.codeEvidence: vehicle_provider_consents queried per vehicle; legacy DIMO_DIRECT path may skip ledger
findings.dataEvidence: VEHICLE_001-003: connection_status CONNECTED, consent status NONE, telemetry active
findings.impact: Authorization/consent UI may disagree with live connectivity; compliance audit gap
findings.reproduction: Lateral join vehicle_provider_consents ORDER BY granted_at DESC LIMIT 1
findings.recommendation: Backfill consent rows for legacy links or derive display status from DimoVehicle + grants

findings.title: webhookConfigured inferred from empty 7d event list — false negative
findings.dataEvidence: 6/6 linked vehicles show zero events in 7d except 1 with unplug; 5 would show not_configured despite active DIMO triggers
findings.impact: Master admin may believe webhooks are not configured when only quiet fleet
findings.reproduction: Linked vehicle with no events in 7d → webhookConfigured not_configured
findings.recommendation: Persist webhook registration status separately; do not infer from event absence

findings.title: ~14% DIMO poll FAILURE rate fleet-wide with null error_code
findings.dataEvidence: 60d: 425652 SUCCESS vs 71972 FAILURE across 6 linked vehicles (~12k failures each)
findings.impact: Intermittent ingest gaps; not root cause of unplug episode bug but reduces observability quality
findings.reproduction: SELECT status,count(*) FROM dimo_poll_logs WHERE created_at >= now()-interval '60 days' GROUP BY 1
findings.recommendation: Classify FAILURE error_code; alert on sustained failure ratio per vehicle

findings.title: Readiness score ignores device episode state and capability context
findings.dataEvidence: VEHICLE_005/006 readiness 88% while open unplug episode; evSoc penalizes ICE vehicles
findings.impact: Fleet Connectivity readiness misleading for operators during tamper episodes
findings.reproduction: Compare readiness-comparison CSV raw vs capability-adjusted columns
findings.recommendation: Capability-adjusted scoring + episode penalty or separate device health dimension

findings.title: No device-unplug notifications despite open episodes
findings.codeEvidence: Phase 1 scan: notification.evaluation not wired to device connection events
findings.dataEvidence: 60d notifications query: 0 device_unplug types; unrelated alerts only
findings.impact: Silent operational risk if unplug during booking — severity computed but not notified
findings.reproduction: Query notifications 60d for device connection types → empty
findings.recommendation: Explicit product decision: wire notifications or document intentional silence

findings.title: 31 connectivity consumers split across three parallel truth layers
findings.dataEvidence: consumer-wiring CSV: 14 CANONICAL, 9 LEGACY, 6 UNKNOWN, 2 PARTIAL
findings.impact: Operators see different connectivity states depending on surface without single ViewModel
findings.reproduction: Compare GET /fleet-map telemetryFreshness vs GET /fleet-connectivity connectionStatus for same vehicle at 30h quiet
findings.recommendation: Introduce unified ConnectivityViewModel consumed by Fleet tab and device card or align legacy APIs

findings.title: Fleet Connectivity tab remains on LEGACY 24h API contract
findings.dataEvidence: Phase 2 freshness matrix; Phase 6 consumer row fleet_connectivity_tab
findings.impact: Dedicated connectivity surface disagrees with dashboard/fleet list canonical 48h offline
findings.reproduction: Simulate lastSeenAt now-30h: fleet tab offline vs dashboard signal_delayed
findings.recommendation: Migrate Fleet Connectivity tab to canonical telemetryFreshness or document explicit product split

findings.title: Seven connectivity alert types missing from registry or unwired
findings.dataEvidence: alert-resolution-matrix: 7/10 types MISSING or UNKNOWN producer
findings.impact: No dedupe, resolution, or recovery notification path for device unplug episodes
findings.reproduction: grep registry for DEVICE_UNPLUGGED → empty; VPS 60d deviceUnplugNotifications=0
findings.recommendation: Product decision: add registry entries + producers or document intentional silence with episode closure UX
requiredTests: notification producer integration test for device connection events

findings.title: Episode recovery policy fails all four required steps
findings.codeEvidence: device-connection-read-model.ts event-only openUnpluggedEpisode; no alert resolution
findings.dataEvidence: alert matrix open_episode_recovery_rule=FAIL; 2/2 episodes stuck; 0 recovery notifications
findings.impact: Open episode never closes, no alert resolve, no reconnected info, Gerät getrennt persists after telemetry recovery
findings.recommendation: Implement snapshot-based closure + optional DEVICE_RECONNECTED notification

findings.title: Operational gates correctly isolated from webhook episodes (positive)
findings.codeEvidence: booking-vehicle-preflight.ts uses isVehicleOffline not openUnpluggedEpisode; rental-health rental_blocked separate
findings.impact: Positive finding — standby/soft offline and unplug episodes do not incorrectly block rental
findings.reproduction: resolveBookingVehiclePreflight for vehicle with openUnpluggedEpisode but live telemetry → isSelectable true
findings.recommendation: Preserve separation when fixing episode read-model

webhookReliability.notes: Fleet has only 2 historical device webhooks; reliability stats not statistically significant. Dedup buckets unique (2/2).
